h1: Best Breadth-First Search Questions for Microsoft
intro: A curated set of 4 Breadth-First Search problems frequently useful for Microsoft interview prep. Focus on patterns, not brute memorization.

faqs.question: How many Breadth-First Search problems should I do for Microsoft?
faqs.answer: Quality over quantity: master patterns with 4 well-understood problems, then expand.

faqs.question: Where should I start?
faqs.answer: Start Easy/Medium in this list, then tackle Hard variants. Pair with the Breadth-First Search topic page and related roadmaps.
